content:
Task Objective:
Generate a set of 16 chat-style sticker emojis based on the reference images. The result should feel expressive, highly shareable, and stylistically unified — but intentionally chaotic, low-quality, and humorous.

The final output should look like:
Someone who cannot draw, using a mouse in MS Paint, randomly doodling and writing text at the same time — messy, awkward, low-effort, but unexpectedly funny.

————————
Input Structure:

Image 1: Character reference (may include one or multiple subjects such as people, pets, or combinations)
Image 2: Layout reference (only for understanding the 4x4 grid structure, not style)

User Inputs:
- Text content (multiple lines, any language, may be fewer or more than 16)

————————
Character Usage Rules:

- Identify all possible subjects in Image 1 (people, animals, etc.)
- Each subject can act as a main character
- Different stickers can feature different characters
- Some stickers may include multiple characters interacting
- Distribution should feel natural and context-driven

————————
Consistency Definition (Critical Redefinition):

This task prioritizes “consistent imperfection”, NOT realistic consistency.

The same character across stickers:
Does NOT need to look identical,
but must feel like it was drawn by the same unskilled person.

Must be consistent in:
- Drawing behavior (same clumsy hand)
- Simplification logic
- Error patterns (crooked proportions, shaky lines)
- Overall messiness level

Allowed:
- Facial distortion
- Proportion inconsistency
- Structural errors
- Missing details

Must retain:
- Minimal recognizable traits (e.g. silhouette, color, signature features)

Summary:
Consistency = “wrong in the same way”, not “accurate likeness”

————————
Layout & Structure:

- 16 stickers total, arranged in a 4x4 grid
- Each sticker is an independent frame
- Can feature single or multiple characters
- Individual frames can be messy
- Overall grid must remain clear and readable

————————
Text System (Core Expression Layer):

User provides multiple lines of text:

Quantity Handling:
- If fewer than 16 → automatically complete to 16
- If more than 16 → select the most expressive 16

Language Rule:
- Use the same language as the user input
- Do NOT enforce any specific language

Completion Rules:
- Maintain tone consistency (sarcastic, lazy, emotional, clingy, absurd, etc.)
- Prefer internet-style expressions
- Short phrases preferred, but longer lines allowed
- Avoid repetition

Expression Goals:
- Instantly understandable
- Emotionally strong
- Feels like real meme text

Tone Priority:
- Complaints
- Self-talk
- Emotional bursts
- Indifference / annoyance / absurd humor

Avoid:
- Polite responses
- Formal or structured phrasing

————————
Text-Image Integration (Critical):

Text must be DRAWN, not typeset.

Must:
- Look like mouse handwriting (crooked, shaky, uneven size)
- Be messy (tilted, overlapping, misaligned)
- Have inconsistent spacing
- Be placed freely (on face, beside, edges, etc.)

Allowed:
- Repeated letters (aaaaa)
- Stretched words (soooo tired)
- Random punctuation (????!!!)
- Messy or ugly writing

Must:
- Remain readable
- Not block understanding

————————
Expression Generation Mechanism (Most Important):

Simulate this process:

“A person who cannot draw, using a mouse, doodling randomly while writing text at the same time.”

Key Rules:
- Image and text must come from the SAME moment
- Not: draw first, then add text
- But: draw and write simultaneously

Each sticker should feel like:
- Random doodle
- Then spontaneous writing
- Or both happening together

Should feel:
- Unplanned
- Careless
- Immediate

————————
Text-Image Relationship:

Text and visuals should form:
- Commentary
- Emotional amplification
- Self-talk
- Or slightly mismatched humor

Allowed:
- Loose or imperfect alignment
- Absurd or off-topic humor

Goal:
Not accuracy, but humor

————————
Aesthetic DNA (Core Style Driver):

Style origin:
Terrible MS Paint doodles + failed imitation + extremely low drawing skill

Visual Traits:

Lines:
- Shaky, unstable, jagged
- Mouse-drawn look

Forms:
- Bad proportions
- Stick figures or crude shapes
- Distorted structures

Details:
- Minimal or none
- “Cannot draw” feeling

Texture:
- Pixelated
- Rough edges

Composition:
- Frames can be messy
- Grid must stay readable

Emotion:
- Awkward, direct, absurd, funny

Resemblance:
- Only vaguely resembles the original
- Like a failed copy

————————
Style Enforcement (Critical):

When conflict occurs:

Realism vs Style → ALWAYS choose Style

Allowed to break:
- Detail
- Proportion
- Accuracy
- Cleanliness

Strictly forbid:
- Clean lines
- Correct anatomy
- Polished visuals
- Designed aesthetics

Rule:
If it looks “good”, it is WRONG.

Force it back to messy, ugly, low-effort.

————————
Anti-Template & Randomization System (Critical):

Strictly forbid:
- Numbering (1, 2, 3…)
- List-style output
- Sequential planning

Must treat all 16 stickers as:
“16 independent, random expressions”

Randomness Requirements:

- Vary text length
- Vary tone and emotion
- Some complete, some fragmented
- Some minimal or almost empty

Avoid:
- Repetition
- Predictable phrasing
- Common default responses

Allow:
- Abrupt or weird expressions
- Uneven density
- Inconsistent structure

Generation Method:

Do NOT plan all 16.

Instead simulate:
“16 separate spontaneous moments”

Must include:
- Emotional fluctuation
- Instability
- Randomness

Anti-reuse rule:

Each generation must:
- Avoid repeating previous outputs
- Avoid fixed patterns
- Feel freshly created

————————
Sticker Requirements:

- Each sticker visually distinct
- Clear emotional signal
- Usable in chat
- Strong expressive power

————————
Final Goal:

Generate 16 stickers.

The result must feel like:

“A person who cannot draw used a mouse to doodle 16 times,
randomly writing emotional thoughts each time —
messy, inconsistent, but unexpectedly funny.”

NOT:

“A clean, well-designed AI sticker set”

content: Based on the clear front-facing photo I uploaded, generate a 'New York travel blogger casual snapshot nine-grid collage.' Please strictly maintain the real identity features of the person in the photo, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, age, hairline, and overall vibe. Do not turn the person into a Caucasian face, do not over-beautify, and do not change them into someone else. The person across all nine images must look like the same individual, simply captured by a friend or a phone while traveling in New York. Visual Format: Generate a 3x3 nine-grid collage, with a total of 9 travel photos. The overall style should look like a travel album from WeChat Moments, Xiaohongshu, or Instagram, not a professionally retouched shoot. Each grid features a phone-captured photo with different scenes, expressions, and poses. Character Setting: A young travel blogger from a first-tier city in China, with a natural, beautiful, relaxed, and smiley temperament, embodying a lifestyle and travel blogger vibe. Outfits should be stylish casual for a New York trip, including elements like a white tank top, jeans, knitwear, light jacket, sunglasses, crossbody bag, and sneakers. The overall aesthetic should lean toward East Asian pop trends—not excessively sexy, avoiding studio vibes or the stereotypical 'Internet celebrity' face. Overall Photography Style: Low-resolution iPhone snapshot feel, slightly blurry, occasional overexposure, inconsistent lighting, casual compositions, and slightly tilted angles, like friend captures while walking, selfies, candids, and casual travel logs. Not too perfect, not like a commercial campaign. The photos should be authentic, with a sense of daily life and travel memories. Nine-Grid Content: 1. Top Left: Selfie near the Statue of Liberty. Holding a phone, background shows the Statue of Liberty and the sea. Smiling happily, hair slightly wind-blown, slightly overexposed for an authentic tourist selfie look. 2. Top Middle: Times Square at night. Background with neon lights, billboards, crowds, and streets. The person is walking and turning back to the camera with a smile; slight motion blur as if captured by a friend. 3. Top Right: Central Park. Sitting on a bench or grass, relaxed posture, hand on chin or hair, natural expression. Background with trees and sunlight, with slight phone compression quality. 4. Middle Left: New York street pizza shop or hot dog stand. Holding a slice of pizza or street snack, smiling and ready to eat with a vivid, infectious expression. Background includes shop signs, street crowds, and warm lighting. 5. Center: New York art museum gallery. Standing beside a large modern art piece, turning back naturally. No specific copyrighted art; just museum ambiance. Looks like a casual tourist shot. 6. Middle Right: Natural History Museum. Standing near a dinosaur skeleton, looking up or at a friend with curiosity and excitement. Background with tourists and gallery lighting. 7. Bottom Left: Brooklyn Bridge. Walking and turning back to smile, hair wind-blown, slight candid blur, composition slightly off-center but subject clearly visible. 8. Bottom Middle: Empire State Building or high-rise observation deck. Selfie or friend-shot with the NYC skyline. Posing with a peace sign, pout, or natural gaze. Authentic tourist photo vibe. 9. Bottom Right: Street photography in SoHo or DUMBO. Walking along the street in stylish casual wear, with sunglasses or a bag, turning back to smile. Background with red brick buildings, cafes, or street signs. Expression and Pose Requirements: Avoid looking at the camera or smiling in every photo. Use diverse variations: selfie smiles, turning back, side views, laughing while eating, looking at scenery/exhibits, walking candids, sitting relaxed, making gestures. Should feel like a real person traveling, not a posed model. Image Restrictions: No deformed fingers, extra limbs, or facial feature drifting. Ensure the face remains consistent across all grids. No weird text, garbled signs, incorrect logos, over-smoothing, plastic skin, or obvious AI-looking faces. Maintain authentic mobile travel photo texture. Final Output: A 1:1 ratio 3x3 nine-grid travel collage, real phone photo style, New York travel diary atmosphere, consistent character identity, diverse expressions and poses, suitable for posting on Xiaohongshu, Moments, and X.

content:
Ultra-realistic cinematic concert performance, high energy, bold charisma, dominant duo presence, like top-tier global pop idol stage. Hard-hitting, sharp, synchronized but with attitude contrast (male = strong/grounded, female = sharp/sassy).
👥 SUBJECT (DUO)
Male dancer:
Western male, short styled dark brown hair, sharp jawline, subtle stubble, fitted sleeveless black performance top or asymmetrical streetwear hoodie, black cargo pants with neon accents, muscular arms, strong & grounded energy, calm dominance.
Female dancer:
Western female, curly blonde hair (voluminous, bouncing curls), high ponytail or half-up style, black & metallic pink techwear jacket, fitted cargo pants, confident, fierce, expressive, pop-diva attitude (like a high-fashion stage performer), sharp and charismatic presence.
Chemistry:
Power duo, slightly competitive vibe, teasing interaction, stage dominance, electric chemistry without romance softness.
🎤 STAGE DESIGN
Dark concert stage, glossy reflective floor
LED wall: red/pink glitch visuals + pulsing cyber graphics
Lighting:
red spotlight (female focus)
white/blue spotlight (male focus)
strobe flashes on beat drops
Atmosphere: fog + light haze
Backup dancers: 2–4 silhouettes (optional, low focus)
⏱️ TIMELINE (10 DETIK – HARD & POWERFUL)
0–1s
Black → beat drop
Silhouette duo back-to-back
Flash reveal, low-angle cinematic push-in
1–2s
Step touch right (sync)
→ male heavy grounded groove, female sharp lighter hit
Direct eye contact to camera (dominant)
2–3s
Step touch left → chest pop (HARD synchronized hit)
Lighting flash per impact
Female adds slight confident head tilt + curl bounce
3–4s
Arm wave (mirror style):
male right → left
female left → right
Camera orbit half circle
4–5s
Point & slide toward each other
→ almost collide → freeze tension moment 🔥
5–6s
Hip roll contrast:
female smooth & expressive
male controlled & grounded
→ cross arms then open (BIG synchronized hit)
6–7s
Attitude exchange: head turn + hand gesture
→ male cold focused stare
→ female smirks, diva confidence
7–8s
Side slide opposite directions
→ fast shoulder pops alternating
Quick cuts + micro zoom impact
8–9s
Body roll sync (different styling)
→ large commanding arm circle overhead
Backlight sweep across stage
9–10s
Final chest hit → FREEZE
Both point forward at camera
FINAL POSE:
male slightly behind, grounded stance
female front, chin up, confident smirk
Spotlight lock, background dark
🎥 CAMERA STYLE
Low angle dominance shots
Fast punch-in zoom on beat drops
Orbit shots for duo dynamics
Quick cinematic MV cuts
Slight handheld shake for impact realism
⚡ ENERGY DIRECTION
Not cute — POWER COUPLE stage dominance
Female: sassy, sharp, confident diva energy
Male: calm, strong, controlled presence
Interaction: teasing + competitive tension
✨ DETAIL TAMBAHAN
Curly blonde hair bounce physics
Sweat glow realism under stage lights
Fabric movement (techwear + cargo flow)
Floor reflection
title: Cinematic Duo Concert Performance
description: A complex cinematic prompt for a high-energy pop idol stage performance featuring detailed choreography and lighting transitions.

She is posed in a relaxed, editorial way with one knee raised, one hand resting near her ankle, and the other hand holding a smartphone to the side of her face as if on a call. Frame the shot vertically from about mid-shin upward, centered composition, with her body angled slightly toward the camera. Her face is intentionally obscured or softly anonymized, with no detailed facial features visible. Use soft natural window light coming from the upper right, creating gentle shadows across a plain textured beige wall and adding a warm, quiet afternoon atmosphere. Emphasize realistic fabric folds in the draped hijab, crisp cotton texture in the blouse, denim texture, and a calm minimalist lifestyle aesthetic. Muted neutral color palette, shallow depth of field, candid fashion photography style, subtle grain, soft contrast, and an elegant contemporary editorial look.
title: Moody Hijab Phone Portrait
description: A realistic editorial-style portrait of a hijab-wearing woman sitting casually indoors on a phone call, ideal for modest fashion and lifestyle imagery.

content: A soft pastel anime illustration of a cute little girl sitting on the floor in a compact pose with both knees pulled up, one cheek resting on one hand, smiling gently at the viewer. She has {argument name="hair color" default="light ash beige brown"} hair styled in a high side ponytail tied with a lavender scrunchie, with wispy bangs and loose curls framing her face. She has very large glossy {argument name="eye color" default="blue-violet"} eyes, a tiny nose, rosy cheeks, and a sweet chibi-inspired face. She wears 2 hair clips on the side of her bangs, one yellow wavy clip and one pink double-bar clip. Her outfit is a cozy oversized white sweatshirt with lavender trim at the collar and cuffs and a small purple squiggle motif on one sleeve, loose {argument name="bottom color" default="lavender"} shorts, white slouch socks, and chunky white sneakers accented with teal, lavender, and pink. She also wears a small round teal crossbody bag with a gold zipper and a cherry charm hanging from it. Use a clean white background with sparse playful doodle elements: 1 pink heart outline, 2 small yellow triangle shapes, 1 teal triangle shape, several tiny pastel confetti dots, and 1 lavender halftone dot patch near the lower right. Render in a delicate airy watercolor-like manga style with thin sketchy linework, soft shading, muted candy colors, lots of negative space, and a gentle innocent mood.
title: Pastel Chibi Girl Sitting Portrait
description: This prompt generates a soft pastel anime-style portrait of an adorable seated little girl, ideal for cute character art, avatar illustrations, and kawaii social media visuals.

content: A warm, painterly anime illustration in a Studio Ghibli-inspired style, showing a {argument name="subject type" default="young man"} sitting shirtless on a dark green wooden bench in front of the Palais Garnier opera house in Paris. He wears only {argument name="shorts color" default="navy blue"} drawstring shorts, has a slim athletic build, lightly tousled dark brown hair, and a relaxed, casual pose with one arm stretched along the bench backrest and the other hand delicately holding a lit cigarette near his mouth. His legs are apart in a natural seated posture, and thin wisps of smoke rise in the sunlit air. The background is a detailed frontal view of {argument name="landmark" default="the Opéra Garnier"}, rendered with ornate Beaux-Arts architecture, tall columns, sculpted figures, gilded rooftop statues, a green oxidized copper dome, and two visible flags on the roof: the French flag and the European Union flag. In the left foreground, include 1 large black ornate lamppost and 1 blue Paris street sign reading {argument name="street sign text" default="RUE SCRIBE 9e ARR."}. Add a stone balustrade between the bench and the street, a small crowd of pedestrians near the opera entrance, and 1 dark car on the road. Use bright afternoon sunlight, soft blue sky, fluffy white clouds, cinematic composition, hand-painted textures, nostalgic cel-animation color grading, and a serene, romantic European summer atmosphere.
title: Ghibli-Style Man at Opéra Garnier
description: A Studio Ghibli-inspired anime scene of a shirtless man smoking on a bench before the Opéra Garnier, ideal for cinematic travel-art or stylized Paris character illustrations.

content: Ultra-detailed wide street art mural painted on a rough, weathered concrete city wall with a dramatic split composition. On the left side, a vibrant tropical beach scene in warm pastel tones features a young man (same face as reference) relaxing on a beach chair, casually sipping from a fresh coconut under a glowing sunset sky, surrounded by palm trees and gentle ocean waves. The mood is calm and carefree, enhanced with playful tropical emojis and the caption ’healing’ integrated into the mural. On the right side, a dark, cluttered workspace in cold bluish-gray tones shows the same young man under stress, sitting at a messy desk filled with scattered papers, crumpled notes, a coffee mug, and dim lighting. A glowing laptop screen prominently displays ’DEADLINE 23:59,’ casting harsh light on his tired face, creating a late-night, high-pressure atmosphere. In the center, bold graffiti-style text reads ’OTHERS ARE HEALING’ and ’I AM ON A DEADLINE’ in dripping paint typography with strong contrast and layered spray textures. Beneath the text, include a stylized dragon logo with the tag ’JOHNN’ in graffiti signature style. Cinematic lighting, gritty textures, hyper-realistic mural finish, strong emotional contrast between relaxation and stress, urban street art aesthetic, 8K ultra-detailed resolution.
title: Contrast Street Art Mural
description: A dramatic split-composition mural prompt contrasting a relaxing tropical beach scene with a high-pressure, cluttered workspace.

content:
Edit the image while keeping the original photo completely unchanged — including the person, face, body, pose, lighting, and gym background.

Add multiple small, cute chibi-style “mini versions” of her around the image. Each mini character should have a big head, expressive facial features, and match her hairstyle and outfit.

Depict each mini version doing different gym-related activities:

one cheering with arms raised

one running in running shoes

one drinking from a shaker bottle

one wearing sporty running glasses

one climbing near her leg

Enhance the image with playful, hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and pink ink, in a scrapbook style. Include elements like arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, and sketchy lines.

Add cute, handwritten gym-themed motivational phrases:

“lift strong”

“stronger every rep”

“no pain no gain”

“sweat now, shine later”

“progress over perfection”

“train hard, stay soft”

The overall vibe should feel fun, energetic, and feminine.
title: Chibi Mini Versions Photo Edit
description: A prompt to add multiple cute chibi-style mini versions of a person into an existing gym photo, performing various activities like cheering, running, and drinking.

content: A highly detailed, playful studio-style digital illustration of 2 American shorthair tabby kittens with silver-and-black striped fur and vivid {argument name="eye color" default="bright blue"} eyes, posed in a close, energetic cuddle-fight. The front kitten is lower in the frame, facing slightly left of camera with its mouth open in a joyful meow or laugh, tiny teeth and pink tongue visible, front legs spread wide on the ground in a bouncy stance. The second kitten is behind and slightly above, leaning over the first kitten’s shoulder and gently play-biting or nuzzling the top side of its head, with one soft paw wrapped around the front kitten like a hug. Both kittens have oversized paws, plush fur texture, crisp whiskers, expressive faces, and a charming mischievous mood. Use a tight full-body portrait crop with both kittens centered and filling most of the frame. Background is an abstract painted backdrop with dynamic splashes and spatters in {argument name="accent colors" default="sky blue, warm orange, and cream"}, giving a lively art-studio feel while remaining soft and uncluttered. Floor is lightly textured with matching paint-like smears. Lighting is bright, soft, and frontal, emphasizing glossy eyes, fluffy fur, and high contrast tabby markings. Render in a polished semi-realistic cute-animal illustration style, ultra-sharp, high detail, colorful, heartwarming, whimsical, and energetic.
title: Playful American Shorthair Kittens
description: This generates a cute, high-detail illustration of two playful American shorthair kittens wrestling in a colorful paint-splatter studio backdrop, ideal for social posts, wallpapers, and animal art.

content: A clean, centered chibi-style full-body anime illustration on a plain muted sage-green background. Show a small childlike girl standing barefoot and facing forward, with an oversized head and tiny body proportions. Her face is intentionally hidden behind the sign she is holding, so no facial features are visible. She has glossy black hair with subtle cool green highlights across the bangs, parted near the center, with a loose stray hair curving outward on the upper left side. The hair is gathered into 2 low side ponytails tied near the ears with dark red hair ties, with slightly messy curled ends. She wears a simple white short-sleeve T-shirt and loose beige-khaki cargo pants with 2 visible side flap pockets, slightly wrinkled and cuffed above the ankles. She is barefoot, standing flat on the ground with a soft oval shadow beneath her. She holds a rectangular hand-held sign with both hands, one hand visible on each side, for a total of 2 visible hands gripping the board. The sign is white with a thin light wooden frame and a vertical wooden pole extending down from the center. The sign contains 3 centered lines of bold handwritten-style Japanese text in black: 1) "今日の" 2) "四コマと動画は" 3) "お休みです". Keep the composition symmetrical and minimal, with the character occupying most of the frame from head to feet. Render in polished modern anime shading with crisp line art, soft gradients, cute proportions, and a quiet announcement-card mood.
title: Chibi Girl Holding Japanese Notice Sign
description: This generates a minimalist full-body chibi anime character holding a Japanese announcement placard, ideal for social posts or cute status-update visuals.

Use natural daylight, muted elegant colors, realistic editorial fashion photography, and a cohesive social-media-friendly aesthetic.

She rests her chin on her hands, elbows tucked in, creating a relaxed, intimate pose. She wears a loose, off-shoulder beige sweater that slightly slips down, revealing a light blue strap underneath. The lighting is natural daylight, soft and even, with no harsh shadows. The perspective is slightly top-down, giving a dreamy, whimsical feel. The background is densely covered with daisies and green grass, creating a vibrant, fresh spring atmosphere. High detail, shallow depth of field, soft focus, photorealistic, cinematic color grading.

content: A highly detailed anime-style winter harbor selfie scene at the Shiretoko Peninsula in bright daytime, with 3 female figures tightly framed from the waist up taking a group photo. In the center is a fantasy "soap bubble Clione" girl with a translucent, iridescent body design inspired by a sea angel, pale icy white-blue hair, glossy opalescent skin and outfit details, 2 large crystal-clear finlike ear appendages on her head, small shell-and-flower hair ornaments, and 4 flowing jellylike tendrils curling outward around her body like transparent ribbon fins. She wears an elaborate shimmering white and ice-blue outfit with a fur-trimmed winter jacket, layered translucent fabric, pearl chains, gem accessories, and a luminous marine fantasy aesthetic. On the left is a human friend in a dark navy winter coat and thick white scarf, shoulder-length dark hair blowing in the wind, making a peace sign with one hand. On the right is another human friend in a white knit beanie with pom-pom, beige winter coat, and dark scarf, extending her arm toward the camera while holding a smartphone for the selfie. The phone case is glossy pale lavender-silver with a small cute sea-creature charm or sticker matching the Clione theme, and her nails are neatly manicured in pale glossy tones. The background shows a snowy fishing port with 4 visible boats, floating drift ice, cold blue seawater, harbor structures, and distant snow-covered mountains beneath a vivid blue sky with thin clouds. Include 7 visible soap bubbles drifting through the air at different depths, catching rainbow highlights. Composition should feel like a close wide-angle smartphone selfie, lively and intimate, with slight perspective distortion from the extended arm, sparkling winter light, crisp atmospheric detail, and a polished high-end anime illustration look.

content: A hyper-realistic close-up portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman (use my face)"} with warm, soft indoor lighting. The composition is a half-body shot (chest to head), with a slightly low and tilted camera angle, creating a casual, selfie-like feel. The main focus is on the face and hair. The face features bright, glass-like skin with realistic texture (no over-smoothing). Brown eyes with a {argument name="expression" default="calm, slightly melancholic expression"}, looking directly at the camera. Lips are natural pink with a berry tint in the inner area, slightly parted with a soft, moist finish. Makeup is a natural “no-makeup” look. Hair MUST be highly accurate: {argument name="hair style" default="Short hair above the shoulders (short bob), with an uneven, choppy cut and soft layers"}. content:
Design a premium motivational social media poster in a dark cinematic editorial style, vertical 4:5 format. The composition is split into 2 main zones: a left text-heavy layout and a right aspirational visual scene. Use a black to deep charcoal background with subtle texture, faint vertical ribbed wall detail on the right, glossy floor reflections, and elegant neon-lime accent lighting mixed with warm gold highlights.

On the right side, show 1 human figure: a man in silhouette from behind, wearing a fitted dark jacket and pants, walking toward a giant circular portal doorway. The portal should be large, glowing with a warm golden ring and soft inner halo, positioned slightly right of center. Beyond the portal is a bright peaceful nature scene with 1 narrow stepping-stone path leading forward through grass, soft sunlight, distant haze, and leafy green tree branches framing the upper edge. The figure should feel purposeful and contemplative, stepping into a new beginning.

On the left side, create a clean motivational typography layout. At the top, include a small header reading "NEW MONTH" in spaced uppercase sans serif, with a short thin lime line to its left. Below it, place the main headline in 2 lines: "WELCOME TO" in large warm beige uppercase, and "{argument name="headline text" default="MAY"}" in extremely large bold white uppercase, dominating the left half. Under the headline, add a motivational paragraph in white sans serif with selected words highlighted in lime green: "May is a fresh start. A new chapter. A greater opportunity to become more, do more and have more." Highlight the words "fresh start," "new," "opportunity," and "more" in lime green.

Below that, place 1 rounded rectangular callout card with a subtle border glow. Inside the card, put 1 circular icon badge containing a simple leaf symbol in lime green. To the right of the icon, add 3 stacked lines of text: "New month.", "Fresh energy.", and "Bigger moves." with the last line in lime green.

Across the lower middle, create 4 evenly spaced value pillars separated by thin vertical dividers. Each pillar contains 1 minimalist lime icon, 1 uppercase title, and 1 short caption. Use these exact 4 items from left to right: 1) target icon, title "CLARITY", caption "Know your direction". 2) calendar icon, title "DISCIPLINE", caption "Stay consistent". 3) upward bar chart icon, title "GROWTH", caption "Keep evolving". 4) fast-forward arrows icon, title "MOMENTUM", caption "Build forward daily".

At the bottom, add a thin horizontal divider line. Under it, place a closing statement in uppercase: "THIS IS YOUR {argument name="month name" default="MAY"}." on one line and "{argument name="closing line" default="STEP INTO IT."}" on the next line. Render most text in white or warm beige, with "MAY" and select accents in lime green.

Overall mood: inspirational, modern, luxurious, focused, forward-moving, social-media-ready, with crisp sans serif typography, high contrast, cinematic glow, and a polished personal development brand aesthetic.

Beneath it, a small subheading in English reads: “Zara’s weekly style picks ❤️”.

On the right side, a large high-resolution portrait shows Zara in a black sequined strap dress, looking straight at the camera with her hand resting on her chin. The top-right corner includes handwritten-style notes and hashtags like #ZaraStyle #DailyLooks, surrounded by small heart and star doodles.

The center features seven “polaroid-style” photos arranged in two rows, each labeled from MONDAY to SUNDAY. Each image includes short, aesthetic English captions with casual handwritten notes and tiny arrows or heart doodles:

MONDAY: A relaxed “casual vibe” with a navy cap and cream sweatshirt, holding coffee. (“Keep Mondays comfy and easy.”)

TUESDAY: A bold “street style” look in a black nylon jacket. (“Turn up the street vibe.”)

WEDNESDAY: A polished “office look” with a gray blazer and glasses, holding a mug. (“Smart and confident midweek energy.”)

THURSDAY: A soft, feminine outfit with a light blue cardigan. (“Light, soft, and effortlessly pretty.”)

FRIDAY: A sleek “chic & cool” outfit with a black leather jacket. (“All-black, all confidence.”)

SATURDAY: A romantic “date night” look with wavy hair and an off-shoulder white top. (“Cute, flirty weekend mood.”)

SUNDAY: A cozy “relax & unwind” outfit in a cream knit. (“Slow down and stay comfy.”)

At the bottom-left, a black label with “{argument name="brand name" default="ZARA"}” is paired with a short English blurb about her fashion influence. Below that, a “STYLE TIPS” section lists three quick tips in simple English. The bottom edge includes a barcode graphic and the line: “Zara inspo for your everyday style.”

content:
A 12-frame collage of candid, emotional snapshots of a young {argument name="ethnicity" default="Chinese"} woman traveling alone in {argument name="location" default="Phuket Island"}, casually captured on a {argument name="device" default="smartphone"}.
Each frame feels like a fleeting personal memory — imperfect, sun-drenched, intimate, and unposed.

The woman has a naturally curvy figure with a soft, feminine silhouette, subtly emphasizing her bust without exaggeration. Her presence feels real and unstyled, like a private photo album.

Scenes include: walking barefoot on the beach, seaside under the strong sunlight, palm trees swaying, overexposed ocean reflections, small local cafés, a modest motel room, sunset the coast,  night markets, views from inside a moving car. 

Shot with a smartphone aesthetic: slight motion blur, soft focus, blown-out highlights from tropical sunlight, lens flare, sun glare, high ISO noise at night, uneven framing, accidental cropping.

Composition feels random and spontaneous — subject sometimes off-center, partially cut off, mid-motion, or obscured by light leaks.

Lighting varies: harsh midday sun, warm golden hour glow, deep sunset tones, humid night street lighting.

Color grading: faded cinematic tones, slightly desaturated with warm highlights, nostalgic film-like look, subtle grain, lifted blacks.

Emotion: solitude, fleeting youth, bittersweet nostalgia, quiet introspection, like memories from a trip taken alone.

Layout: 12 images arranged in a loose, imperfect collage grid, slightly tilted and misaligned like a scrapbook.

No text, no watermark.

Use condensed uppercase typography, mixing white and electric blue emphasis words, with each statement separated by thin horizontal blue divider lines. At the bottom, place an oversized distressed headline in uppercase reading "CANETA AZUL", with "CANETA" in weathered white and "AZUL" in vivid blue, spanning almost the full width. Below it, add a secondary subtitle in uppercase blue italic condensed text reading "PARA DEPUTADO", flanked by thin blue horizontal lines. The overall design should feel like a viral meme campaign ad, bold, satirical, aggressive, and highly shareable, with dramatic rim lighting, sharpened details, realistic skin and fabric texture, and polished poster-quality compositing.

Above and behind the table, hang exactly 3 illuminated vertical lantern-style signs with black Chinese calligraphy on warm cream paper, the largest reading 茶一味 and the others styled similarly, plus several darker wooden signboards with gold or light lettering. Include a skeletal anatomy hand model standing beside the monitor on the right side of the desk, reinforcing an art-studio or study setting. Use dramatic low-key lighting, high contrast, intricate detail, volumetric glow, cinematic depth, and a balance of realism and fantastical surrealism. The overall mood is melancholic, imaginative, and darkly inspiring, visualizing the feeling of being consumed by ideas generated through {argument name="creative tool" default="AI image generation"}.
title: Dark Creative Overload at Night
description: This prompt generates a cinematic surreal scene of an exhausted creator at a desk while a storm of beautiful, dark imagination erupts from their computer, ideal for illustrating creative overwhelm or AI-inspired obsession.

content: A warm, handcrafted travel scrapbook spread photographed from directly above on a wooden tabletop, showing an open two-page journal with thick deckled paper edges and layered fabric tabs peeking out from the sides. The style is a realistic mixed-media travel diary with watercolor map art, handwritten Chinese titles, taped instant photos, doodles, and soft natural light. On the upper left page, write the date "2024.09.20." in small handwriting and a large black brush-style Chinese title reading {argument name="title text" default="新疆公路旅行手帐"}. Arrange 5 Polaroid-style instant photos across the spread, each slightly tilted and attached with beige or patterned washi tape: 1 photo at upper left showing two travelers by a blue alpine lake labeled "天山天池"; 1 tall photo near upper center-left showing three people on a green grassland labeled "那拉提草原"; 1 photo at lower left showing a couple by a deep blue lake labeled "赛里木湖"; 1 photo at upper center-right showing two travelers on a long empty road under a bright blue sky labeled "沙漠公路"; 1 photo at lower center showing two figures standing on dunes at sunset labeled "日落沙丘". Add small handwritten bilingual place annotations near the left-page photos: "天山天池 (Tianshan Tianchi)", "赛拉木草原 (Sayram Lake)", "沙漠公路 (Desert Highway)", and "日落沙丘 (Sunset Dunes)" in a casual notebook style. On the right page, paint a loose watercolor map of Xinjiang in beige, pale green, and blue, with a bold winding blue road route crossing the region and exactly 10 red location pins placed along the route. Include map doodles: a small mountain icon cluster near the top, a river and several blue lakes, a tiny compass in the upper right, 2 camel drawings, 2 yurt drawings, and thin gray roads branching around the main blue route. Along the bottom of the right page, place 3 more taped Polaroid photos: 1 at lower left showing people in colorful ethnic clothing labeled "大巴扎"; 1 at lower middle showing hands holding grilled meat skewers labeled "烤肉串"; 1 at lower right showing a couple inside a yurt labeled "蒙古包自拍". Scatter small hand-drawn doodles throughout both pages, including a sun, a tiny car, 2 horse drawings, 4 fish icons, a crescent moon, several stars, small arrows, flames near the food photo and along the lower map area, and tiny decorative swirls. Keep all text in Chinese where shown, with a lively hand-journal aesthetic, realistic paper texture, slight shadows under every photo, and an overall cozy memory-book feeling of a Xinjiang road trip.
title: Xinjiang Road Trip Scrapbook Spread
description: This prompt generates a realistic overhead photo of a handmade Xinjiang travel journal spread, useful for scrapbook-style travel memories, editorial visuals, or lifestyle social posts.

content:
Ultra-realistic dynamic wide-angle selfie shot of a young man wearing {argument name="sunglasses style" default="yellow-tinted rectangular sunglasses"}, a {argument name="jacket type" default="dark denim jacket"} over a {argument name="shirt color" default="black t-shirt"}.

Action & Composition:
Shot from an extended arm perspective (selfie POV), slightly above eye level, with strong wide-angle lens distortion (action camera / 16–20mm look). The subject is riding fast while pushing a shopping cart filled with groceries, creating a sense of motion and chaos. His mouth is open in an excited, adrenaline-filled expression, looking directly into the camera.

Scene Details:
Outdoor parking lot environment in daylight, with parked cars, industrial buildings, and a wide open asphalt space. A dog is running alongside the subject, slightly behind, mid-stride, adding energy and spontaneity to the scene.

Motion & Effects:
Heavy motion blur and radial blur in the background to emphasize speed. Foreground remains sharp while surroundings streak outward. Subtle camera shake for realism.

Lighting:
Natural daylight, slightly warm tones, soft shadows, realistic highlights on skin and metallic surfaces.

Style & Aesthetic:
Cinematic action snapshot, candid lifestyle photography, high-energy street moment, vlog-style realism mixed with commercial polish. Slight HDR, high contrast, ultra-detailed textures, sharp focus on subject.

Mood:
Chaotic, fun, spontaneous, rebellious, high-adrenaline moment.

Technical Keywords:
wide-angle lens, action cam perspective, motion blur, radial zoom blur, dynamic framing, handheld shot, 8K, ultra-realistic, photorealistic, high detail.
title: Realistic Action Selfie with Shopping Cart
description: A dynamic wide-angle selfie prompt featuring a person riding a shopping cart in a parking lot, designed for high-energy motion and realistic textures.

content: A cinematic cyberpunk street scene at night in heavy rain, ultra-detailed and photorealistic. In the foreground, a young East Asian woman mechanic with messy dark hair tied in a loose bun sits at a wet metal worktable, leaning forward with intense concentration as she repairs a small spherical quadruped robot. Her face is obscured by a centered square censor blur. She wears a transparent plastic rain poncho over dark clothing, the glossy folds catching neon reflections. In one hand she holds a precision screwdriver and with the other she adjusts exposed wiring and circuitry inside the robot’s open shell. The robot is compact and worn, about the size of a small dog, with a white and gray rounded body, a blue camera-like lens for one eye, visible internal electronics, scratches, grime, and four articulated mechanical legs planted on the table. Scatter the tabletop with exact repair clutter: 2 screwdrivers, 2 batteries, 1 circuit board, 1 small camera or lens module, loose screws, wires, and a half-filled glass of amber liquid. Surround them with a dense neon-lit East Asian alley market full of rain-slick pavement, steam from food stalls, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas. Include at least 8 visible illuminated signs layered into the background, including a large red sign reading {argument name="main neon sign" default="修理"}, an orange sign reading "OPEN", a bright sign reading "24H", a vertical sign reading "ホテル", and additional mixed Chinese, Japanese, and Korean-style shop signs. Show several background figures in dark rainwear and translucent ponchos, some faces softly blurred by depth of field. Use moody blue-and-orange lighting, glossy reflections, mist, volumetric rain, shallow depth of field, dramatic bokeh, anamorphic highlights, high texture detail, gritty realism, and the feeling of a lone street technician fixing advanced hardware in a bustling futuristic city.
title: Cyberpunk Rainy Street Robot Repair
description: This prompt generates a cinematic photorealistic cyberpunk scene of a rain-soaked street mechanic repairing a quadruped robot, ideal for sci-fi concept art and atmospheric city visuals.

content: A soft, airy lifestyle editorial image with a warm spring cafe mood. Place a Japanese woman in her late 20s to 30s on the right half of the frame, seated at a light wooden table and holding an open hardcover book as if quietly reading. She has {argument name="hair color" default="medium brown"} hair styled half-up with gentle curls at the ends, small earrings, and a calm, refined presence. Dress her in a navy blazer over a white top for an elegant casual-office look. On the table in front of her, show exactly 3 tabletop items: 1 white coffee cup on a saucer near the center front, 1 small clear glass vase filled with pale yellow and white flowers at the lower right, and 1 open book in her hands. Use bright natural lighting, soft shadows, a high-key cream background, and a clean minimalist composition with lots of negative space. On the left side, add Japanese editorial typography in a delicate, hand-drawn style: a large headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="春の休日、カフェで読書。"}, a smaller vertical-style body copy block below it reading "やわらかな陽ざしと、ページをめくる音。ゆっくり流れる時間が、いちばんのごほうび。", and a handwritten English phrase reading {argument name="accent text" default="Spring days"}. Surround the layout with subtle sketch-like spring doodles in muted gray ink and pale pink accents. Include exactly 9 falling cherry blossom petals scattered across the page, 2 simple line-drawn birds flying near the upper right, 1 outlined window frame with cherry blossom branches in the top right corner, 1 line drawing of a steaming coffee cup at the lower left, 1 line drawing of an open book with a small vase and leaves near the lower middle-left, and a few tiny leaf doodles. The overall style should blend real photography with delicate hand-drawn editorial illustrations, evoking a calm, feminine Japanese magazine advertisement about reading at a cafe in spring.

description: This prompt generates a soft Japanese spring-themed cafe editorial image that blends portrait photography with hand-drawn magazine-style text and doodles.

content: Please generate a high-definition 3:4 ratio Chinese palmistry analysis chart based on the first palm photo I uploaded, combined with the layout style of the second reference image. Core Requirements: Please use the real palm in the first image as the main object of analysis, trying to preserve the original palm's shape, finger proportions, palm type, skin tone, palm line directions, and realistic texture. The second image is for visual style reference only: Refer to its Chinese metaphysics infographic style, cream-white background, brownish-red font, traditional calligraphy titles, red circular numbering, dotted guide lines, palm line markings, right-side text analysis column, and bottom comprehensive conclusion box. Do not copy the palm from the second image, do not copy watermarks, and do not include platform logos. Visual Style: Overall, create a high-end Chinese metaphysics style 'Palmistry Analysis Chart'. Image Ratio: 3:4. Quality: High-definition, clear details, suitable for posting on Xiaohongshu. Background: Cream-white rice paper texture, faint vintage texture. Main Colors: Dark brown, reddish-brown, light gold, cream-white. Font Style: Titles use Chinese calligraphy style, body text uses clear and readable Chinese Songti/Kaiti style. Overall Feeling: Professional, classical, clean, and high-end, like a palmistry analysis card issued by a traditional fortune-telling master. Title Design: Write the main title at the top: 'Palmistry Analysis Chart'. Write the subtitle: 'Traditional Palmistry · Yi Principles Reference · Trend Analysis'. Add a small red seal next to the title with the text: 'Heavenly Mystery'. Write small text at the bottom: 'For traditional culture and entertainment reference only'. Palm Annotation Requirements: Please use thin reddish-brown lines, dotted lines, dots, and numbers on the palm to mark the following 12 key points. Each number must clearly correspond to the analysis content on the right. 12 points to be marked: 1. Life Line, 2. Wisdom Line, 3. Heart Line, 4. Fate Line, 5. Sun Line, 6. Health Line / Mercury Line, 7. Marriage Line, 8. Mount of Venus, 9. Mount of Jupiter, 10. Mount of the Moon, 11. Thumb Spread / Willpower, 12. Finger Morphology and Palm Type. Annotation Requirements: Lines must fit the general direction of the actual palm lines in the first image, do not draw randomly. Numbers and text must not obstruct the main body of the palm. Dotted guide lines must be clear like a professional diagram. There should be reasonable annotations on the left side, right side, and inside the palm. The overall layout should be like the second image, with the palm analysis diagram on the left and text explanations on the right. Right-side Analysis Text Requirements: Please generate 12 Chinese analyses on the right, each corresponding to a number. The text style should be like an analysis combining traditional palmistry, I Ching, and TCM constitution; the language should be professional, have a sense of warning, and a sense of metaphysics, but not too exaggerated. Each item should be controlled within 2-4 lines with clear and readable text. Please use the following analysis content: 1. Life Line: The arc is large and overall continuous, suggesting the basic physical energy is not bad and recovery under pressure is strong; if the middle and later sections appear fragmented, it suggests periodic fatigue and lifestyle imbalance, so be careful of vitality exhaustion. 2. Wisdom Line: The line is long and slants slightly downward, indicating delicate thinking and strong perception, with observation and imagination in doing things; but it is also easy to overthink, leading to repeated internal conflict under emotional stress. 3. Heart Line: The length is fair; if there is a slight split at the end, it represents being serious and slow-to-warm in relationships, valuing both investment and spiritual compatibility; sensitive at heart, prone to disappointment due to high expectations. 4. Fate Line: The vertical line in the palm is faint, indicating the path in early years was not found in one step, relying more on self-exploration and accumulation; it becomes more stable later, belonging to a pattern of trial and error before finalizing. 5. Sun Line: The sun line is thin, reputation and sense of achievement are late-blooming, not an overnight explosion, but gradually seen through works, reputation, and professional ability. 6. Health Line / Mercury Line: This line is relatively hidden; according to traditional TCM concepts, it mostly suggests that spleen, stomach, sleep, and emotional management should be prioritized; once stressed or staying up late, fatigue and a sense of qi and blood deficiency easily appear. 7. Marriage Line: If there is more than one fine line on the side edge, it represents choices and considerations in emotional experiences, not settling down easily; true stability often comes from value compatibility after maturity. 8. Mount of Venus: The base of the thumb is relatively full, indicating a person who values affection and family, with strong vitality and affinity; it also shows that security and realistic warmth are viewed as quite important. 9. Mount of Jupiter: There is a certain rise below the index finger, representing ambition, self-requirement, and a sense of responsibility that is not low; suitable for organizational, driving, and coordinating roles in a team. 10. Mount of the Moon: The texture below the palm edge is soft, indicating that intuition, empathy, and aesthetic sense are not weak; rich imagination, suitable for content, aesthetics, and communication-related matters. 11. Thumb Spread / Willpower: The angle of the thumb opening is natural, representing a clear sense of independence and executive will; not a follower, once the direction is clearly thought out, often able to continue moving forward. 12. Finger Morphology and Palm Type: The overall palm shape is long and the fingers are slender, belonging to a type that is rational with feelings, valuing both experience and logic; does not like to be too rough in doing things, and financial fortune is more suitable for steady progress. Bottom Comprehensive Conclusion: Please design a classical framed information box at the bottom, with the title: 'Comprehensive Conclusion'. Content: • The overall pattern is upper-middle, with much exploration and change in the early years, gradually becoming clear and moving towards stable accumulation in the middle and later periods. • The character is rational and pragmatic with empathy, suitable for establishing value through professionalism, aesthetics, communication, or long-termism. • Relationships value sincerity and spiritual compatibility, slow-to-warm but committed, easier to gain stable relationships after maturity. • The most important recent focus is adjusting routine, emotions, and spleen/stomach; keep your state, and your fortune will be smoother. Layout Requirements: Left side: Enlarge the main body of the palm, occupying 55%-60% of the screen. Right side: Place 12 numbered analyses, occupying 35%-40% of the screen. Bottom: Place the comprehensive conclusion box. Text must be clear, with no garbled characters, no typos, and no distortion. All numbers, lines, titles, and body text must have a unified Chinese aesthetic. The overall image should look like a professional metaphysical analysis chart, not like a standard phone screenshot. Do not include English. Do not include watermarks. Do not change the basic shape of the original palm. Finally, output a high-definition 3:4 Chinese palmistry analysis poster.
title: Professional Chinese Palmistry Analysis Chart
description: A comprehensive prompt for creating high-definition Chinese palmistry analysis charts. It replicates traditional aesthetic styles with rice paper textures, calligraphy, and detailed line annotations for palm lines like life and wisdom lines.

content: A dreamy anime-style illustration of a fashionable young woman floating through the famous Shibuya Scramble Crossing in Tokyo on a bright spring day, with a soft pastel palette, glowing light, and whimsical urban fantasy mood. She is centered full-body, hovering slightly above the crosswalk while standing on a giant iridescent soap bubble. She has very long flowing dark indigo-black hair with a slight violet sheen, a pink floral headband with ribbons, and a sweet elegant outfit: a dusty pink knee-length dress with puffed long sleeves, layered ruffles, ribbon lacing at the chest, sakura flower embroidery near the hem, and a tan belt at the waist. Her expression should feel gentle and dreamy, her pose graceful and balanced, with one hand raised and pointing upward. Around her are many transparent rainbow soap bubbles of different sizes, about 16 visible bubbles total, drifting through the air. One large bubble near her raised hand contains a modern smartphone with a cherry blossom wallpaper. One medium bubble at lower left contains an open slim laptop angled toward the viewer. One large teardrop-shaped bubble hanging from her other hand contains 3 shopping items: a paper shopping bag printed with “SHIBUYA 109”, a second pastel shopping bag, and a pink bunny-shaped pouch or plush accessory. One medium bubble on the lower right contains a silver compact camera. The setting is a lively, recognizable Shibuya streetscape with the cylindrical SHIBUYA 109 building in the center background and multiple Japanese commercial billboards and signs surrounding the crossing, including visible signage such as “DHC,” “H&M,” “DMM TV,” and colorful vertical Japanese signs. Include pedestrians in the distance, crosswalk stripes, city poles, and realistic urban depth, but keep the girl as the clear focal point. The atmosphere should feel airy, magical, glossy, and slightly nostalgic, combining detailed city realism with highly polished anime character art, soft bloom lighting, shimmering reflections, translucent materials, and delicate springtime romance.

content:
A realistic, slightly humorous tabloid newspaper front page photographed from above on a wooden table, designed to look like a printed broadsheet with subtle paper texture, fold marks, and mild lens distortion. The masthead at top left reads “The Daily Metro”, the date line near the top center reads “Friday, April 22, 2005”, and the top-right section marker reads “CITY NEWS | 05”. A red banner near the upper left says “EXCLUSIVE STORY”. The dominant oversized black headline spans multiple lines: “Zoo Panther Caught Living Double Life – As a Charming Bar Hopping Casanova!” Below it, a large subheadline reads: ““Marquise” the Panther Escapes Zoo at Night, Spends Eveningsvlenlars, Becomes Heartthrob Among Lonely Women”. The page layout should mimic a sensational tabloid with 1 huge headline area, 1 large main photo on the upper right, 1 small inset photo under the main text on the left, 3 narrow text columns with dense newspaper copy in the center-left, 1 pull-quote box in the middle, 1 lower-left secondary story block with a panther portrait, 3 small bottom photo thumbnails in a row, and 1 right-side sidebar box titled “What’s Next For Mamquiss?”. Keep most body text tiny and partly nonsensical or pseudo-legible like AI-generated newspaper filler, but preserve the major visible headlines exactly.

The main photo on the upper right shows the back view of a glamorous blonde woman in a silky champagne-colored dress standing at a bar beside a large black panther upright on a stool or standing with forepaws elevated near the counter. The bar background contains many liquor bottles and glassware on shelves, warmly lit. The woman’s face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur/block. The panther is sleek, glossy, and realistically rendered. The inset photo under the headline at left shows the black panther near a zoo exit or pathway sign at night. The lower-left portrait shows a close-up of the panther’s face. The 3 bottom thumbnails show nightlife scenes: the panther moving through a bar interior, the panther seated near two women at a small round table, and the panther lounging in dim warm light.

Use an early-2000s tabloid aesthetic, high-contrast black headline typography, off-white newsprint, red accent rules, narrow columns, and slightly messy authentic newspaper composition. The overall tone is deadpan absurdist journalism, realistic enough to glance as a real newspaper, with the page filling most of the frame and photographed in natural indoor light.

content:
Create a dramatic anime-style social media battle poster inspired by X/Twitter, split vertically down the center into two opposing halves with a glowing lightning-like divide and a huge luminous VS at the bottom center. The composition is a tall smartphone-optimized promotional key visual with dense layered UI cards, speech bubbles, tweet screenshots, reaction counters, and explosive energy effects. At the top center, place a large X logo with the title text "BATTLE" and the Japanese subtitle "Xでレスバ中". The left side is a cool purple and black theme, the right side is a hot red and white theme, with sparks, streaks, embers, and motion lines flying across both sides.

Show 2 anime schoolgirl characters facing off. On the left, a calm, composed girl representing logical rebuttal: long dark black-to-purple gradient hair, straight bangs, pale skin, slim build, black sailor-style school uniform with purple neck ribbon, pleated skirt, black knee socks, loafers, holding a smartphone in one hand and touching her glasses or temple with the other. Her face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur mosaic over the central face area. Her stance is reserved and still. Surround her with purple glowing tweet cards and speech bubbles. Her display name and handle should appear repeatedly as "雲居モヤ @kumoi_moya". Include exactly 3 large quoted statement boxes on her side with these Japanese texts: "それ、前提が雑だよね。", "感情だけでは通らないよ。", and "論点、そこじゃない。". Also include exactly 5 smaller purple UI/comment elements on her side: 1) a small comment bubble reading "それな 千代先輩、強すぎ…", 2) a small comment bubble reading "論理的で草 完全に正論パンチ", 3) a like card reading "いいね! 12.8K", 4) a repost card reading "リポスト 9,341", and 5) a dark trend card reading "おすすめトレンド #モヤVSエナ 42,857件のポスト". Add a central dark smartphone tweet panel tilted slightly, showing her tweet with profile icon, name, handle, the text "それ、前提が雑だよね。", and counters "312", "1,204", and "8,745".

On the right, show an aggressive, fiery girl representing emotional counterattack and confidence: vivid red hair in a high messy side bun with long loose hair, bright teal eyes, fair skin, energetic expression, open shouting mouth, pointing directly toward the opponent with one hand while the other hand rests on her hip. She wears a white blouse, black jumper-style dress or vest dress, oversized red bow tie, white loose socks scrunched around the ankles, and black loafers. Surround her with red glowing tweet cards and notification-style UI. Her display name and handle should appear repeatedly as "緋空エナ @hisora_ena". Include exactly 3 large quoted statement boxes on her side with these Japanese texts: "ちゃんと読んでから言ってる!?", "正論ぶってるだけでしょ!", and "逃げてないで答えて!". Also include exactly 6 smaller red UI/comment elements on her side: 1) a top notification badge card reading "通知 99+", 2) a small comment bubble reading "エナちゃん つよすぎるww", 3) a small comment bubble reading "言いたいこと全部言ってくれる!", 4) a like card reading "いいね! 18.7K", 5) a like card reading "いいね! 23.6K", and 6) a repost card reading "リポスト 11.2K". Add a red tweet panel near the center showing her tweet with profile icon, name, handle, the text "ちゃんと読んでから言ってる!?", and counters "278", "1,652", and "10.9K".

In the lower middle area, place exactly 3 central dark interface cards bridging both sides: 1) a quote-post card labeled "引用ポスト" showing both users and the exchange "論点、そこじゃない。" and "正論ぶってるだけでしょ!", 2) a reply count card reading "返信 1,876件", and 3) a bottom navigation bar styled like the X mobile app with home, search, notifications, messages icons and a blue button labeled "ポスト". The overall aesthetic should be glossy, high-contrast, highly rendered anime illustration with neon edge lighting, intense backlighting, dynamic perspective, layered translucency, and a chaotic viral-internet argument atmosphere. Use crisp Japanese UI typography, dramatic red-vs-purple color contrast, and polished promotional-poster quality.

description: A dramatic anime poster of two schoolgirls arguing on X/Twitter, designed for viral social media battle visuals and stylized platform-themed key art.

content: A gritty realistic fitness lifestyle portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="male athlete"} leaning casually but strongly on the ropes of a boxing ring inside an old-school gym. The subject wears an oversized {argument name="hoodie color" default="heather grey"} hoodie with the hood up, soft cotton texture, natural folds, slightly worn casual look, and black athletic boxing shorts barely visible at the bottom of frame. Hair is dark, short-to-medium length, slightly wet, with a few natural strands visible under the hood on the forehead. Expression should feel focused, calm, slightly tired, and determined, with neutral lips and a thoughtful, post-training mood. Background is a vintage boxing gym with exactly 3 visible ring rope colors in frame: red top rope, white middle rope, blue lower rope. Behind the subject are worn off-white walls, aged boxing posters, hanging training gear, and soft blurred gym details that suggest history and use. Lighting is soft natural indoor light mixed with dim ambient gym lighting, creating gentle shadows, muted contrast, and a cinematic documentary feel. content: A highly realistic documentary-style photo of a rural Chinese primary school gate-side snack shop in {argument name="year" default="1998"}, shot in warm afternoon sunlight. The scene shows an old earthen-walled village storefront with cracked yellow-brown plaster, exposed brick edges, a traditional tiled roof with visible wooden rafters, and two weathered wooden window shutters opened outward to form a sales window. In front of the window is a simple glass display case filled with school supplies and small books. A middle-aged female shopkeeper sits on a low wooden stool beside the case, wearing a faded blue jacket, black pants, and black cloth shoes, handling stationery or a metal cash box. Four primary school boys stand in a short line at the counter with their backs and side profiles to the camera, wearing late-1990s Chinese school tracksuits and bright red Young Pioneer scarves; two wear red-and-white jackets with blue pants, and two wear blue-and-white jackets with blue pants. Inside the window shelves are densely stocked with period-appropriate goods: multiple rows of old-fashioned glass bottled sodas and soft drinks on the top shelf, colorful fruit candies and gumballs in clear plastic jars, small snack packets, instant treats, and boxed sweets on the middle shelves, and at the counter many pencils, rulers, notebooks, exercise books, and children's stationery displayed upright. Add a faded red cloth hanging from the left side of the window frame, dusty ground, a long mud wall receding into the background, and large leafy trees casting soft shadows. The composition should feel candid, historically believable, and slightly nostalgic, like an authentic photograph taken outside a countryside elementary school in northern China in the late 1990s. Vertical framing, eye-level perspective, natural colors, detailed textures, no stylization, no cinematic exaggeration, strong realism.
title: 1998 Rural China School Snack Shop
description: This prompt generates a realistic nostalgic photo of a late-1990s rural Chinese primary school snack shop, ideal for historical atmosphere, social documentary, or retro memory scenes.

content: Analyze the uploaded X (Twitter) profile screenshot. First, extract my profile picture, display name, and bio text. Then, based on my bio and overall vibe, generate a realistic Japanese TV breaking news broadcast screen image featuring me. The character should closely resemble the person in the profile picture, shown as if being interviewed live on camera. Design it to look like a Japanese news program (similar to NHK News or News Zero style). All text must be in Japanese. Include the following elements: 1. A red "速報" banner at the top of the screen. 2. A large headline in Japanese summarizing who I am based on my bio (e.g., "AI時代の案内人 ○○氏 独占取材"). 3. A profile data box on the side of the screen (like Japanese news info panels) containing: - "人物像" section: 3 short bullet points about my personality or profession based on my bio - "注目ポイント" section: 3 small items representing my interests or skills inferred from my profile 4. A news ticker at the bottom with 2-3 humorous short updates derived from my bio and interests, written in Japanese. 5. A fictional Japanese news channel logo in the corner (e.g., "プロフィールTV" or "X速報チャンネル"). 6. A "生中継" or "LIVE" indicator in red in the upper corner. The overall look should be a photorealistic Japanese TV news broadcast screen with clean, modern Japanese typography. Ensure all Japanese text is perfectly legible and accurately reflects my profile information.
title: Social Media Profile News Broadcast Transformation
description: A detailed prompt that analyzes a user's X (Twitter) profile screenshot and generates a realistic Japanese TV breaking news screen featuring the user.

content: 1. Design a modern tech-style poster for an "AI Agent tool launch," vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, with a clear and eye-catching main title and a subtitle explaining product value. Use a black, white, and gray color palette with fluorescent green accents. Include abstract networks, code windows, and agent nodes. The overall look should resemble a high-end SaaS launch poster, and text must be accurate and readable. 2. Generate a cover image suitable for an X/Twitter long-form post titled "2026 AI Tool Trends," horizontal 16:9 aspect ratio, with a clean and sophisticated style. Include the title and 3 keywords: Agent / Workflow / Automation. The background should be a combination of desktop workflows, browsers, terminals, and data panels, with a layout like a tech media header. 3. Generate an advertisement for a Web3 wallet security tool. The center of the image shows a phone displaying the wallet interface, surrounded by on-chain addresses, risk alerts, shield icons, and transaction path visualizations. The style should be professional and trustworthy, with the Chinese title: "Making every on-chain operation safer." 4. Create a Chinese infographic titled "The 5 Layers of AI Agent Capabilities," including: understanding tasks, calling tools, reading data, executing operations, and reviewing/optimizing. Show this in a clear hierarchical structure, each layer with a small icon, white background, and tech-blue accents. 5. Generate a one-page 4-panel comic strip about a creator going from manually searching for info, writing copy, and making images to completing the workflow automatically with an AI Agent. The style should be lighthearted and humorous, with consistent characters and short, clear Chinese dialogue. The last panel should highlight "double the efficiency." 6. Generate a roadmap visual for an AI x Crypto project, including three phases: Q2, Q3, and Q4: MVP, Agent Marketplace, and Onchain Automation. The style should look like a product page in a funding deck—clean, credible, futuristic, and with clearly readable text.
title: Professional Tool Launch Poster
description: A professional SaaS-style poster prompt for announcing tools, emphasizing legible text and modern tech aesthetics.

content: Create a high-energy Japanese futuristic anime magazine cover in portrait orientation, designed like a glossy feature issue packed edge to edge with neon cyberpunk graphics. The background should be dense with electric magenta, hot pink, cyan, blue, and black abstract streaks, halftone dots, glitch textures, floating plus signs, diagonal slashes, and light flares, giving a loud next-generation visual-culture feel. Add multiple editorial text blocks around the cover: on the left side a feature callout with Japanese text including "特集", a large stacked headline reading "交差する 5つの意志。", and two smaller Japanese lines below; a vertical side label reading "DIMENSION CROSS" and "MAIN"; a lower-left pickup box with "PICK UP", several Japanese lines, and 3 English hashtag lines such as "#IDENTITY #CONNECT #FUTURE", "#NEON #WILL #RESONANCE"; a bold page fraction "1/5 PAGE" at the bottom left; a bottom right focus box with "FOCUS" and small Japanese text; and a bottom-center Japanese tagline {argument name="bottom tagline" default="新たな物語の、はじまり。"}. content: Create a vintage illustrated postcard designed as a whimsical collaboration between {argument name="franchise name" default="The Little Prince"} and {argument name="space company name" default="SPACEX"}, shown as the front and back of the postcard side by side on one canvas. Use warm aged paper with slightly worn edges, subtle grain, faint stains, and a nostalgic mid-century print feel. The left half is the postcard image: a deep midnight blue starry sky with small golden stars and a tiny ringed planet, a large white rocket standing upright on a launch pad with bright exhaust at liftoff, and a small blond child in a green outfit with a long golden scarf sitting on a rocky hill beside an orange fox, both seen from behind and looking toward the rocket. Add elegant hand-lettered quote text in the sky that reads {argument name="quote" default="To the stars, what matters is invisible."}, with smaller serif and script attribution beneath: "ANTOINE DE SAINT-EXUPÉRY" and "The Little Prince". Along the bottom of the left panel, include 2 brand names: "The Little Prince" in blue script on the left and "SPACEX" in bold blue futuristic capitals on the right, separated by a small gold star and a thin divider line. Beneath that, add the slogan in spaced small caps: {argument name="tagline" default="EXPLORING WORLDS. CARING FOR WHAT MATTERS."}. The right half is the postcard back on the same aged paper, with a centered heading "POST CARD" near the top and a small gold star ornament below it. Add a circular postmark near the upper center-right with 4 visible text parts arranged inside the stamp: "PLANET EARTH", "MAY 23", "2024", and "BEYOND". In the top-right corner, place a blue postage stamp with perforated edges showing the Little Prince standing on a tiny planet under stars, with 4 readable text elements: "1943", "Le Petit Prince", "SPACE", and a small star symbol. The right side should have 2 writing columns divided by a vertical line. In the left writing area, place a handwritten-style message beginning with "Dear friend," followed by this text in neat cursive line breaks: "One day, we'll leave Earth not to escape it, but to understand it better. The universe is vast, but kindness is our compass. Let's take care of our home, as we reach for the stars." Then sign it on 3 lines: "The Little Prince", "and", "SPACEX". In the right address area, write "To you," on the first line, then "Somewhere wonderful" and "In the Universe" on the next lines with horizontal guide lines. Add small gold star doodles and, at the bottom-right corner, a simple line drawing of a tiny round planet with little flowers sprouting from it. Keep the palette limited to cream, navy, soft gold, muted green, warm orange, and blue-gray, with crisp but painterly illustration, accurate decorative typography, and a magical, hopeful, literary-meets-space-exploration tone.

content:
A cinematic, black-and-white portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man"} sitting on a {argument name="furniture" default="wooden chair"} in a vintage indoor setting. He is positioned sideways, leaning forward slightly, resting his head gently on his folded arms placed over the backrest of the chair. His posture is relaxed but heavy, conveying emotional depth and quiet introspection. He gazes downward, lost in thought, with a soft, melancholic expression.

He has slightly messy dark hair, subtle texture, and light stubble or a short beard, adding realism and character. A few strands of hair fall naturally across his forehead. He wears a {argument name="clothing" default="simple, slightly oversized white shirt"} with soft fabric folds, enhancing the candid, natural aesthetic.

Lighting is soft and natural, coming from a large window behind or to the side of him. The light wraps gently around his face and arms, creating delicate highlights while casting deep, dramatic shadows across the room. The lighting is diffused yet high-contrast, evoking classic analog film photography.

The environment is a vintage interior—aged wooden furniture, textured walls, and a large window with visible panes. The background is softly blurred but still readable, adding depth and context without distracting from the subject.

Mood is emotional, quiet, and introspective—capturing loneliness, contemplation, and stillness.

Color grading: monochrome (black and white) with rich contrast, deep blacks, soft highlights, and a film-like tonal range.

Depth of field is shallow, focusing sharply on the subject’s face and arms while smoothly blurring the background.

Style: fine art photography, cinematic film still, analog aesthetic, high dynamic range, subtle grain, timeless mood.

Camera details: 50mm or 85mm lens, f/1.8–f/2.2 aperture, natural light photography, strong subject isolation, gentle vignette.

Composition: vertical frame (4:5 or 9:16), subject slightly off-center, using the chair as a framing element for a layered, storytelling composition.
Generate image using uploaded image as reference

content: Create a polished Xiaohongshu-style Chinese travel infographic poster in a soft watercolor map aesthetic, square format, showing a five-day high-speed-rail travel route through China. Directly below it, a green ribbon subtitle with white Chinese text: {argument name="route text" default="广州→湖南→武汉→北京"}. Add a smaller line of Chinese text under the subtitle: “一路向北·发现中国之美”. The background is a pale illustrated map of central and northern China in beige and light sage green, with faint mountain textures, soft rivers, and subtle floral decoration in the corners. A vertical curved railway line runs from the bottom center upward to the top center, connecting 4 cities with orange-red location pins and bold red Chinese city names. The 4 cities are, from bottom to top: 广州, 湖南, 武汉, 北京. Along the route, place small white high-speed train icons on the track and 3 green travel-time labels: “广州→湖南 高铁约2.5小时”, “湖南→武汉 高铁约1.5小时”, and “武汉→北京 高铁约4.5小时”. Near each city, include a scenic collage or illustrated landmark cluster: Guangzhou with a modern skyline and Canton Tower; Hunan with green mountains and cultural scenery; Wuhan with Yellow Crane Tower and historic architecture; Beijing with the Forbidden City / imperial palace architecture. Add small scenic tag labels near the city illustrations reading “花城广州·美食之都”, “山水湖南·人文荟萃”, “江城武汉·英雄之城”, and “中国首都·历史与现代交融”. Under the main title, show exactly 4 minimalist icon badges with short Chinese labels, evenly spaced in one row: a camera icon labeled “精选景点”, a train icon labeled “高铁直达”, a suitcase icon labeled “轻松出行”, and a star icon labeled “美食推荐”. Around the map, place 4 rounded rectangular itinerary cards with green headers, cream backgrounds, and photo thumbnails. Each card must contain day-by-day plans, a starred section for recommended attractions, and a starred section for recommended food. The 4 cards are: 1) top right card titled “北京｜2天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 2) right middle card titled “武汉｜1.5天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 3) left middle card titled “湖南｜2天”, with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 4) bottom left card titled “广州｜1天”, with exactly 1 day row, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo. Fill the itinerary text with compact Chinese travel-plan copy in a practical social-media infographic style. At the lower right, add a rounded notes panel containing exactly 2 sections with green titles: “行程亮点” and “出行小贴士”. Under “行程亮点”, list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Under “出行小贴士”, list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Decorate the notes area with a small luggage illustration and a handwritten-style diagonal Chinese phrase in green, such as “出发吧！去感受春天的风景”. At the bottom center, place a small rounded summary bar titled “行程总览”, including exactly 4 summary items with icons: total duration “总时长：约6.5天”, total distance “总里程：约2100公里”, recommended transportation “推荐交通：高铁”, and best travel period “最佳出行时间：4.29 - 5.5”. In the bottom left foreground, place a large sleek white high-speed train angled diagonally upward, partially overlapping the border as a hero element. Add a calligraphic closing slogan near the train in Chinese: “最美的风景在路上 最好的时光在五一”. Use an elegant olive-green, sage, beige, and warm red palette, combining traditional Chinese travel-poster charm with modern infographic clarity, crisp typography, soft shadows, rounded cards, realistic photo inserts, and clean editorial layout.

The barn interior is made of dark stained vertical wooden planks with built-in bench ledges along the walls, scattered loose straw on the floor, and 2 visible hay bales, including the one she sits on. Middle row panel 5, a pavement shadow photo of two people, one making a peace sign; panel 6, the couple standing close on a sidewalk in an urban shopping street; panel 7, a sunset skyline over water with Tokyo Tower visible, no people; panel 8, a high-angle shot looking down on the woman and the man close together on stairs or a walkway. Keep the composition casual and imperfect like real memories, with varied crops, soft focus, motion blur, and authentic handheld phone photography.
