The main subject is a beautiful anime girl centered slightly right, shown from the waist up, with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="deep blue"} hair blowing in the wind, decorated with small star hairpins, wearing a dark hoodie and large studio headphones around her neck, against a glowing sunset-to-night city skyline filled with sparkling lights, music-energy particles, lens flares, and flying glowing petals. Her face area is obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. Use a vivid palette of electric blue, violet, magenta, gold, and sunset orange. Fill the design with layered Japanese typography that is crisp, readable, and integrated into the art like a polished event advertisement. Include exactly 8 major text groups: top left copy reading 「始まるのは、キミと創る 音楽の物語。」 with a smaller subcopy beneath reading 「AIを使って、みんなで音楽をつくる特別な3日間。」; top right a glowing marquee sign reading 「GW連休!」 and a smaller neon box below reading 「みんなで最高の音楽をつくろう!」; center main title with small English text 「AI MUSIC BOOTCAMP 2」 above huge Japanese title text 「AI音楽 ブートキャンプ 2」; a gigantic gold metallic announcement across the middle reading 「開催決定!」; a date bar reading 「開催期間」 followed by 「5.2 SAT 土」 and 「5.4 MON 月」; a hashtag callout near the bottom reading 「参加はカンタン!! #AI音楽ブートキャンプ2 をつけて投稿するだけ!」; a lower encouragement line reading 「初心者も大歓迎! みんなで最高の音楽体験を!」; and 3 bottom feature captions with icons reading 「一緒に学ぶ 仲間とつながる」, 「AIで創る 新しい音楽体験」, and 「想いをカタチに 自分だけの1曲を」. On the left edge, add a vertical filmstrip with exactly 4 inset panels showing the same girl in music-related scenes: 1) performing on a stage before a crowd, 2) working at a music production desk with screens and equipment, 3) singing into a microphone, 4) playing an acoustic guitar. Add exactly 2 neon music-themed icon illustrations in the lower area: a tilted smartphone with a music note on the lower left and a glowing microphone with musical notes on the lower right. Make the text effects glossy, luminous, and embossed with gold and white highlights, with energetic streaks and spark explosions around the headline. content: A striking artistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="charismatic woman"} (image attached) that precisely captures her face, seated in a serene yet powerful pose. She sits cross-legged on a minimalist floor with decorative tiles, wearing a modern {argument name="top" default="blue sweatshirt"} with a minimalist print, {argument name="bottom" default="loose-fitting jeans"}, and black Converse sneakers. Her expression is serene and subtly confident, with a gentle smile and relaxed eyes as she gazes slightly toward a diffused light source. Behind her rises a monumental abstract mural of her own face, painted with bold and expressive brushstrokes in charcoal gray, white, gold, and muted red. The mural is not a literal copy, but a stylized and emotive interpretation of her: intense eyes, fragmented textures, broad brushstrokes that suggest movement, ambition, and inner complexity. Its scale dominates the background without overshadowing the main figure, creating a harmonious balance between reality and artistic representation. The lighting is cinematic and evocative, with soft reflections at the edges and a subtle overhead glow that defines her silhouette. Fine particles, like dust, float subtly in the air, catching flashes of light and enhancing the atmosphere. The setting evokes the fusion of a modern art studio with a dreamlike exhibition space: clean, spacious, minimalist, yet charged with emotion. Photographed with ultra-realistic quality, using a 50mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, sharp details, and elegant color gradation, the scene conveys creativity, introspection, and personal transformation. Negative: blurry, overexposed, cartoonish, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, merged faces, unrealistic colors, watermark, text. ar. 9 :16

A realistic dark-mode social media post screenshot styled like X/Twitter on a black interface. The tweet text in large white sans-serif type reads: {argument name="tweet text" default="ChatGPT Images 2.0 can match your handwriting."} Below it is a side-by-side comparison image made of 2 notebook photos separated by a narrow black vertical gap. Both photos show an open lined notebook page shot from above under dim indoor lighting with soft shadows near the bottom edge. The left notebook page is mostly blank except for 2 handwritten lines in neat blue cursive at the top that say: {argument name="handwriting prompt text" default="match my hanawriting ana write a poem for me.."} Keep the misspellings and punctuation exactly as written. The right notebook page shows the same first 2 handwritten lines at the top, followed by a handwritten poem in matching blue cursive handwriting filling the page in 4 stanzas. The poem text reads exactly: {argument name="poem text" default="between the pages, quiet dreams, where ink becomes the stars, i write what my heart means, and let it heal the scars.

the world may move so fast, but here, time slows its pace. in every line i’ve made to last, i find a softer space.

some days are clouds, some days are sun, but i keep showing up. with every word, i’m not alone— my pen is my cup.

so here’s to thoughts, both big and small, to hopes, to fears, to me. i’ll keep on writing through it all, and set my spirit free."} The handwriting should look natural, slightly uneven, and convincingly human, with blue ballpoint pen texture. content: A realistic candid smartphone flash photo in a crowded bar, vertical 3:4 composition. Center the shot on an extremely attractive adult woman with long dark brown wavy hair, light tan skin, and a confident casual nightlife presence, wearing a fitted ribbed white tank top. Her face is mostly front-facing and slightly tilted, with a natural candid pose. She is holding up her left hand close to the camera and clearly showing exactly four fingers, thumb tucked in. In her right hand she holds a stemmed wine glass filled with very dark red wine almost completely to the brim, with no visible empty space at the top. The framing is mid-torso portrait, shot at close range like a spontaneous iPhone bar photo with direct flash, realistic skin texture, slight shine, strong foreground illumination, and darker ambient background. Behind her, mount a large round wall clock on a wooden column in the upper right area of the frame, and make the clock clearly read exactly 5:00. The bar environment should look busy and authentic, with warm dim lighting, blurred patrons, liquor signage, and subtle party leftovers on the bar counter. Show exactly 4 types of party remnants: empty glasses, used napkins, metallic confetti pieces, and drink straws. Include a few hanging balloons and streamers in the background, plus a cozy nightlife atmosphere with cluttered surfaces and reflections. Photorealistic smartphone aesthetic, candid nightlife snapshot, slight messiness, true-to-life proportions, accurate hands and fingers, accurate glass shape, accurate clock hands.

The woman on the left has dark brown to black hair styled in a side braid draped over her right shoulder, hands clasped together in front of her chest, and a slightly angled body posture facing right. The woman on the right has long dark wavy hair falling over both shoulders and rests both hands lightly on the top of the podium. Their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. The background is a colorful, dense TV studio design: on the left, a tall pink glitter panel filled with repeating white icons including hearts, triangles, snowflake-like flowers, and tree silhouettes, bordered by ornate gold trim; in the center, a vivid red-orange vertical panel with partial white lettering behind the presenters; on the right, a yellow wall with metallic geometric decorations and a large curved brown mosaic arch studded with small reflective squares. content:
A 12-frame collage of candid, emotional snapshots of a {argument name="subject" default="young Japanese woman"} traveling alone in {argument name="location" default="Hawaii"}, casually captured on a smartphone.
Each frame feels like a fleeting personal memory — imperfect, sun-drenched, intimate, and unposed.

The woman has a naturally curvy figure with a soft, feminine silhouette, subtly emphasizing her bust without exaggeration. Her presence feels real and unstyled, like a private photo album.

Scenes include: walking barefoot on the beach, seaside in strong sunlight, palm trees swaying, overexposed ocean reflections, small local cafés, a modest motel room, sunset coast, night markets, views from inside a moving car.

Shot with a smartphone aesthetic: slight motion blur, soft focus, blown-out highlights from tropical sunlight, lens flare, sun glare, high ISO noise at night, uneven framing, accidental cropping.

Composition feels random and spontaneous — subject sometimes off-center, partially cut off, mid-motion, or obscured by light leaks.

Lighting varies: harsh midday sun, warm golden hour glow, deep sunset tones, humid night street lighting.

Color grading: faded cinematic tones, slightly desaturated with warm highlights, nostalgic film-like look, subtle grain, lifted blacks.

Emotion: solitude, fleeting youth, bittersweet nostalgia, quiet introspection, like memories from a trip taken alone.

Layout: 12 images arranged in a loose, imperfect collage grid, slightly tilted and misaligned like a scrapbook.

No text, no watermark.

Create a lively Chinese event poster with a warm, trendy coffee-shop aesthetic, photographed from inside a seaside cafe looking out through large floor-to-ceiling windows at palm trees, a bright blue sky, outdoor seating, and a Ferris wheel in the distance. The composition should feel like a candid lifestyle scene combined with energetic graphic design. In the foreground, place a dark wooden table with 1 open laptop centered near the bottom, 1 takeaway coffee cup with a black lid on the right side of the table, 1 black bag on the left, and 1 short stack of books near the left edge. Use a sunlit, slightly golden afternoon atmosphere with reflections on the glass and a relaxed vacation vibe.

Overlay bold poster graphics in a collage style using torn paper, brushstroke paint, stickers, and taped note-paper elements. The main headline on the upper left should be huge, hand-painted Chinese calligraphy in dark brown and orange, reading “疯狂星期四”, with a small yellow tag near it that reads “第11期”, and an even smaller top-left badge reading “活动预告” with a tiny megaphone icon. Beneath the main headline, add a green brushstroke banner with the text “下周四，不见不散！”, and below that a smaller line in parentheses: “（五一长假前最后一期）”.

Add 2 torn notebook-paper cards: 1 in the upper right and 1 in the lower left. The upper-right note should contain a short invitation paragraph in Chinese, neatly typeset in black and orange text, reading: “让我们海边小聚，远眺摩天轮，吹吹海风，和 App & AI Builder 们一起聊聊产品、远程生活与创作。” and include a small orange heart doodle in the bottom-right corner of that note. The lower-left note should list 3 info blocks with icons and orange section headers: “时间”, “地点”, and “说明”. Under “时间”, write “2026年04月23日 (星期四)” and “12:00 ~ 18:00”. Under “地点”, write “南山区·前海石公园·福叁咖啡”. Under “说明”, write “无需报名，随时来吧！”.

Across the middle-right area, place a large playful white script-style slogan with a dark outline, angled slightly upward, reading “喝咖啡、随意交流 海边散步，主打一个 Chill~”. Add 1 illustrated coffee cup sticker next to this slogan on the right. Use energetic orange paint splashes and sketch doodles around the headline and notes to make the poster feel youthful and spontaneous.

At the bottom, place a wide off-white torn-paper footer strip containing 3 feature blocks laid out horizontally. Block 1: a snowflake-like icon with the text “舒适环境” and smaller text “空调 + 宽敞桌椅”. Block 2: a Wi‑Fi icon with the text “电网无忧” and smaller text “WiFi + 插座”. Block 3: larger orange handwritten text “期待与你 海边相遇！” with a blue underline flourish and a tiny heart doodle. The overall design should mix real photography and graphic poster elements, with strong contrast, brush lettering, scrapbook textures, cafe lifestyle realism, and a fashionable AI-generated social-media event-poster look.

content:
{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. 
Act as a high-end sports graphic designer creating a conceptual tribute poster. The style is a complex "dual exposure photo-grid composite" with mixed-media textures.
CENTRAL STRUCTURE (THE VESSEL):
The central focus is a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of {argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. This main portrait acts as the container.
THE GRID FILL & TEXTURES (MIXED MEDIA):
The interior of the silhouette is populated by a dense "photo mosaic grid" of action shots from the person's career.
CRITICAL TEXTURE INSTRUCTION: Do not just paste flat photos. Apply artistic textures to various grid cells to create a tactile, collage feel. Use effects like:
Halftone Dots: Comic-book style raster patterns on some cells.
Fabric/Embroidery: Subtle thread or canvas textures suggesting a jersey or patch.
Film Grain: Heavy noise on specific high-contrast action shots.
COLOR STRATEGY:
The base is Monochrome B&W. Use selective color overlays (relevant to the team/flag) ONLY on specific grid cells to create a rhythm.
TYPOGRAPHY & BRANDING (STRICT MICRO-SCALING):
Top Left (The Name): Write "{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}" strictly using the font {argument name="font family" default="Inter Semibold"}.
Kerning: Tight negative kerning (-4%).
Size: SMALL and discreet. It must occupy MAXIMUM 20% of the canvas width. Do NOT make it large or loud.
Top Right (The Symbol): Place the primary logo (Team/Brand/Flag).
Size: VERY SMALL. It must occupy MAXIMUM 10% of the canvas width.
COMPOSITION & BACKGROUND:
Background: Off-white or light grey with a visible high-quality paper or concrete texture. It should not be flat digital white.
Alignment: Center the figure perfectly. Maintain wide negative space around the object.
title: Dual Exposure Sports Graphic
description: A sophisticated prompt for creating a mixed-media sports tribute poster using silhouette containers, photo-mosaic grids, and tactile textures like halftone dots and film grain.

content: A highly detailed anime-style smartphone lock screen wallpaper in a vertical 9:16 composition, themed entirely in sparkling pink idol aesthetics. The scene features {argument name="character name" default="Akari"}, a cheerful teenage magical-idol girl with very long voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} twin-tail hair, bright green eyes, fair skin, and a playful expressive face. She wears an ornate frilly stage costume in layered pink, lavender, and white with gold trim, ribbons, heart motifs, lace cuffs, a choker bow, star earrings, and floral heart hair accessories. The background is a dreamy glitter-filled pink haze with bokeh, sparkles, and soft glow effects. Design it as a fake phone lock screen with a large white lock icon near the top center, cellular status icons in the upper right, and the date in Japanese reading 5月22日 木曜日 above a large glowing time display reading {argument name="time display" default="22:22"}. Include 5 visible character depictions of the same girl: 1 large central half-body figure winking and holding one finger to her lips in a teasing pose, 1 upper-left bust portrait laughing with eyes closed, 1 upper-right full or three-quarter body pose joyfully raising a small wand or key-like object, 1 lower-left smaller figure partly obscured by a blurred pink rectangle over the face while reaching outward, and 1 lower-right crouching figure with another blurred pink rectangle over the face while interacting with a large physical lock. Add handwritten Japanese sound-effect style text around the figures, including playful exclamations and notes. Show 2 message notification banners styled like iPhone alerts, both from メッセージ and お兄ちゃん with the text 今どこ〜？, one tilted on the left and one upright on the right. Across the lower middle, place a rounded translucent slider bar with Japanese text スライドでロック解除 and a lock icon. Make the unlocking concept literal by attaching an oversized brass padlock and latch mechanism to the slider, with the lower-right character appearing to unlock it using a key; add nearby handwritten Japanese text suggesting lock removal and a metallic click sound. In the lower left, include 2 circular utility icons, a flashlight and a trash can, plus a comic-style speech bubble reading ポイッ！. Add a camera icon in a dark circular button at the lower right and a thin white home indicator at the very bottom. Render everything with polished glossy anime illustration quality, soft lighting, dense sparkles, layered transparency, and a cute mischievous mood, as if an idol character has taken over and physically prevented the phone from being unlocked.

content: Create a clean modern Chinese tech blog cover in a wide 16:9 layout with a soft light-gray background, rounded-corner canvas, and minimalist dashboard aesthetic. On the right, show a floating desktop-app style server monitoring panel with a white card body, subtle shadow, rounded corners, and a pale beige browser top bar with three small circular window buttons. The panel header should read “BandwagonHost – CN2 GIA”, with a smaller line underneath “洛杉矶 · CN2 GIA” and a green status label “运行中”, plus on the top-right a small clock icon and the text “运行时长 27 天”. Inside the panel, include exactly 5 metric cards across the top row labeled “CPU” showing “12%”, “内存” showing “28%”, “硬盘” showing “18%”, “带宽” showing “1.2 Mbps”, and “延迟（本地）” showing “156 ms”, each with a small teal icon and a thin teal progress bar. Below, place a large line chart card on the left titled “稳定性（近 7 天）” with a top-right annotation “可用性 99.92%”, a teal fluctuating line, a vertical scale from 97% to 100%, and date labels from “05-13” through “05-19”. To the right of the chart, add a specs card titled “配置摘要” listing exactly 5 rows: “CPU 2 vCPU”, “内存 2 GB”, “硬盘 40 GB SSD”, “流量 1 TB/月”, and “系统 CentOS 7.9 64bit”. In the lower-left area overlapping between the text block and the dashboard, add a smaller white recommendation card with rounded corners and shadow. Its title line should include a yellow bookmark icon and read “购买参考 · 重点看这几项”. Inside, list exactly 4 rows: “线路质量  CN2 GIA”, “稳定性  ★★★★☆”, “性价比  中上”, and “适用场景  建站 / 中转 / 轻应用”. Add soft decorative elements in the background: a pale mint abstract rounded shape in the bottom-left corner, a faint dotted mint pattern above it, and a light dotted curved connector line arcing from the left text area toward the top of the dashboard, with a small yellow dot on the curve. Place a small rounded yellow name tag in the bottom-right corner of the canvas with the text “小墨同学”. Use a restrained palette of dark navy, teal, yellow, white, and light gray, with crisp vector-style rendering, subtle shadows, spacious composition, and a polished AI-generated editorial cover look for a VPS comparison article.

Most are teenage boys in black gakuran-style jackets or dark blazers with white shirts and ties, and several teenage girls wear dark blazers with blue plaid skirts. Many students hold up peace signs, some crouch in front, and a few sit or recline on the wooden floor in the front row. The classroom has white walls, a round wall clock above the chalkboard, a fluorescent ceiling light fixture, and subdued indoor lighting. The background shows a classical Chinese landscape painting with distant mountains, a small pavilion on a cliff, mist, and dense bamboo leaves framing the upper right and right edge, plus dark pine branches on the lower left.

The wooden desk fills the lower third and contains exactly 8 distinct object groups: 1 brush pot holding 4 brushes on the left, 1 stack of 4 stitched books with Chinese titles on the spines reading “人工智慧概論”, “機器學習原理”, “負責任的 AI”, and “對齊與價值觀”, 1 ink stone or ink dish near the center-left, 1 central parchment diagram sheet, 1 small dark cube seal near the bottom left with Chinese characters on two visible faces, 1 framed placard on the right, 1 rolled scroll at the bottom right, and 1 tabletop surface with visible wood grain. The rolled scroll at the bottom right should display the phrase “以謹慎之心 創造未來”.

Use a balanced composition, scholarly calm mood, highly detailed ink linework, subtle watercolor shading, antique museum-print aesthetics, and a restrained palette of parchment tan, ink brown, faded blue, and muted charcoal. content: A photorealistic selfie on the surface of Mars, framed at arm’s length in a casual slightly wide-angle smartphone perspective. In the foreground are 2 subjects standing close together from chest-up: a human man on the left wearing a black crewneck shirt with a clear white OpenAI logo on the chest, and a tall elegant female alien on the right with shimmering blue-green metallic skin, elongated ears, subtle facial ridges, and a sleek biomechanical-looking outfit with bronze and silver tones, a deep neckline, fine ornamental seams, and layered necklaces with a prominent blue gemstone pendant. The man has short dark messy hair and his left arm extends toward the camera as if taking the selfie. The alien leans in close beside him, both posed like a friendly commemorative snapshot. The background is a red rocky Martian desert with scattered stones, low hills, and a dusty orange sunset sky. On the far left stands a roadside-style sign with 2 lines of text reading {argument name="sign headline" default="MARS"} and {argument name="sign subtext" default="WELCOME HOME"}. On the far right in the distance is 1 large retro-futuristic white rocket standing upright on landing legs, with visible vertical text reading {argument name="rocket text" default="SPACEX"}. Warm orange lighting, cinematic realism, detailed textures, subtle atmospheric haze, social-media-announcement vibe, high detail, natural depth of field.

content: A side-by-side desktop screenshot comparing two nearly identical AI-generated street portraits in separate macOS-style image viewer windows against a light cyan background. The layout has exactly 2 vertical image panels, left and right, each inside a rounded gray window with a toolbar at the top. The left window title begins with "NanoBanana2" and the right window title begins with "ChatGPTImage2". In both panels, show the same scene concept: a fashionable young woman standing on a city street corner during golden hour, framed from about mid-thigh to head, with her face obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. She has long wavy brown hair, a slim figure, and wears an off-shoulder fitted cream long-sleeve top, high-waisted blue jeans, a delicate small pendant necklace, and a large black leather shoulder bag with a gold-tone chain strap over one shoulder. She holds a black smartphone in one hand near her waist. The background in both panels is an upscale tree-lined urban street with warm sunlight filtering through leaves, shallow depth of field, parked and passing cars, old stone buildings, and a visible green traffic light near the upper left area of each image. Keep the two portraits very similar but not identical: the left image is slightly cooler, softer, and more muted with a centered street perspective; the right image is slightly warmer, brighter, and crisper with stronger sunlight on the hair and more dramatic bokeh. Include exactly 2 viewer windows separated by a narrow vertical gap, with subtle drop shadows and a clean tech-comparison presentation, as if capturing a visual comparison between two image generation models.

content: A dark, moody fine-dining restaurant scene photographed with direct flash and a slightly unsettling surreal-horror tone. Center the composition on a plated gourmet sandwich that looks like a realistic octopus used as the filling: a glossy golden-brown sesame burger bun on top of a fleshy pink-purple octopus body with detailed veins, pores, suction cups, wrinkled skin, and several visible tentacles protruding from the sides and front. The creature should appear cooked yet disturbingly lifelike, with one bulbous eye-like form visible on the left side and clustered holes and texture on the right side, creating an uncanny bio-organic appearance. The sandwich sits on a large round white ceramic plate with a pool of yellow butter-like or oily sauce spreading beneath it and a few small reddish droplets mixed into the sauce. In the foreground-left background place a small white dish holding a pat of butter. On the dining table include exactly 6 visible drinking glasses: 2 large red wine glasses, 3 tall white-wine or champagne-style stem glasses, and 1 dark beer glass at the right edge. In the back center place 1 small lit candle in a gold-toned holder and 1 small clear vase with white flowers. Use a white tablecloth, very dim ambient lighting, warm candle glow, strong camera flash reflections on the glassware, shallow casual snapshot framing, and a bizarre upscale restaurant presentation that feels grotesque, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, and intentionally shocking.
title: Surreal Octopus Burger Fine Dining Photo
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic surreal-horror restaurant snapshot of an octopus-like burger plated at a candlelit fine-dining table, ideal for bizarre food art or uncanny culinary imagery.

content: A vintage, late 90s amateur flash photograph of a young man repairing an arcade machine. He is kneeling on a dark, patterned arcade carpet, looking back over his shoulder directly at the camera with a neutral expression. He wears a dark short-sleeved t-shirt, baggy blue jeans, chunky white sneakers, and a dark baseball cap. The lower front panel of the arcade cabinet is wide open, exposing its complex internal electronics, including a tangle of wires, green circuit boards, a large speaker, and metal cooling fans at the base. The side of the cabinet features vibrant pink, black, and white graphics with the text "{argument name="arcade game title" default="Dancing Stage"}" and the brand "{argument name="arcade brand" default="KONAMI"}". The setting is a dimly lit arcade interior with other glowing game cabinets visible in the blurred background. A screwdriver lies on the carpet near the man's knee. The image features harsh direct flash lighting, a slightly grainy film texture, deep shadows, and a nostalgic Y2K aesthetic.
title: Vintage Arcade Repair Flash Photography
description: Generates a nostalgic, flash-lit photograph of someone repairing an open arcade cabinet in a dimly lit gaming center.

content:
Flat illustration, high-end oriental fantasy style city poster design, vertical 9:16 composition. The layout uses a diagonal + S-shaped flow extending from the bottom left to top right. The background is deep black grading down to intense dark red, creating strong warm-cool contrast and spatial depth with faint stardust and grain texture. In the center, a flowing golden energy line winds through like a flame, extending upward from the base, featuring fluid texture, particle effects, and gradient highlights, with subtle energy debris and volumetric light.

Within the golden flow, the architectural landmarks of {argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} emerge layer by layer: the Canton Tower is the visual core with prominent proportions, surrounded by the Zhujiang New Town skyline, Liede Bridge, and modern Lingnan architectural elements. Buildings are rendered using "fine line drawing + golden luminous blocks," with clear outlines and rich details, appearing to float in a void against the golden halo, creating a surreal spatial hierarchy with slightly fogged backgrounds for added depth.

At the bottom of the frame is an oriental white-haired female figure with flowing hair like mist, naturally connecting and merging with the golden light. Her hair is translucent with gradient light effects; she has a graceful posture, eyes closed, and a serene expression, holding a bouquet of colorful flowers dotted with shimmering particles, symbolizing the spiritual connection between people and city energy. Character details are moderately simplified to emphasize the overall design.

Lighting is concentrated on the golden flow, buildings, and character outlines, creating intense chiaroscuro and visual focus. The overall atmosphere is grand, mysterious, imbued with oriental mythology, and slightly healing. Colors use black and dark red as a base with brilliant gold as the main visual emphasis. The gold has rich light-dark layers, complemented by small areas of high-saturation floral colors, maintaining a sophisticated and restrained aesthetic.

Integrated text and layout: Centered Songti font at the top reads "{argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} · China," followed by smaller text "{argument name="date" default="2026/04/20"}" and "{argument name="author" default="LIYUE"}" below. Text uses pale gold or soft warm white, unified with the overall lighting. High-quality details, cinematic lighting, rich volumetric and particle details, clean image without noise, ultra-high 8K resolution, commercial-grade poster quality.

content: This scene is a medium-close shot using a eye-level lens, focusing on a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"}. She is shown in a three-quarter shot, sitting with a slight tilt, hips pushed back, legs naturally crossed with the left leg in front and right behind, knees slightly bent. She turns her upper body toward the back right, with her head facing the camera in a classic 'looking back' pose, eyes direct and clear with a hint of playfulness. Her hairstyle is {argument name="hairstyle" default="voluminous brown shoulder-length short hair"} with natural bangs and slightly curled ends. Her makeup is light and natural, with slight eyeliner and natural nude-pink lips. The overall image uses a natural daylight filter, with light hitting from the upper left to create a soft back-lit silhouette. The face and right side of the body are illuminated by warm golden light, while the left side has a natural shadow transition to enhance three-dimensionality. The lighting effect is bright natural light with slight lens flare, creating an afternoon sun atmosphere. From an eye-level angle, the composition places the subject in the middle-right of the frame, with crosswalks and road lines in the background serving as natural leading lines toward the figure. The background is a city street including roads, crosswalks, green belts, and distant vehicles; it is moderately blurred but elements like trees, guardrails, and parked scooters remain recognizable. The composition uses the rule of thirds, with the figure on the right third to balance the frame. The subject wears a {argument name="clothing" default="army green camo hooded sweatshirt"}, paired with black shorts and white high-top sneakers with white mid-calf socks. The backpack is black with orange-yellow decorative stripes and an orange plush pendant, made of canvas and leather. The overall style is street casual, with relaxed body language and a curious, playful expression, presenting an image of a spontaneous, youthful, and vibrant urban girl.

content: A top-down photorealistic image of an open lined notebook resting on a smooth wooden desk. A dark green HB pencil with a silver ferrule and white eraser lies diagonally on the desk to the right of the notebook. The notebook pages are filled with neat, handwritten text in pencil, resembling a student's study notes. On the left page, the top left corner reads {argument name="date" default="2024年5月20日(月)"} above {argument name="subject" default="国語 「枕草子」"}. Below this is a rectangular boxed heading reading {argument name="left page heading" default="清少納言のものの見方"}, followed by exactly three bulleted sentences: one about valuing the changes in nature and seasons, one about finding beauty and amusement in small everyday things, and one about being honest with one's senses while having a sense of humor. Further down is a cloud-shaped border containing a heading translated as 'Words that left an impression', followed by a famous classical quote about spring mornings and a brief explanation below it marked with an arrow. On the right page, the top section has the heading {argument name="right page heading" default="〈現代とのちがい〉"} with exactly two bulleted points: one noting that the perception of seasons is much more delicate than today, and another stating that the perspective is sensory and poetic. This is followed by an arrow pointing to a concluding thought about wanting to cherish this sensibility. Below this is another cloud-shaped border containing a heading translated as 'Summary' and a short paragraph about how the 1000-year-old text still resonates today and the importance of carefully observing nature. At the bottom right of the page, there is a small, simple line drawing of a leafy plant stem next to a scalloped thought bubble containing the text {argument name="final thought" default="感性をみがくって、素敵なことだなあ。"}. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the texture of the paper and the graphite pencil marks.
title: Handwritten Japanese Study Notes
description: A photorealistic top-down view of an open notebook with handwritten Japanese study notes and a pencil, useful for educational or aesthetic mockups.
